title: BUG #19045: Applying custom collation rules appears to erase existing rules
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (field1 varchar(256) COLLATE CI_AS, field2 int NOT NULL CHECK (field2 > 0));
INSERT INTO test_table (field1, field2) VALUES ('this is a string.', 1), ('THIS IS A STRING.', 2);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE field1 = 'This is a string.';
key_bug_features: Altering collation rules erases existing standard rules
